name: Cinnamon Pear Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the pears into 1/2-inch cubes and spread them in a single layer on a foil tray or baking sheet. Freeze, uncovered, in the coldest part of your freezer until solid.
2. Transfer the frozen pear cubes to an electric blender or food processor. Add cinnamon and optional sweetener. Mix with milk gradually, processing quickly, just until the mixture reaches soft-serve consistency.
3. Serve immediately for a refreshing dessert. Makes 4 servings, each approximately 70 calories.
